rationale: The two ensures clauses force both `post{1,2}_packets@.map_values(|p: CPacket| p@).to_set()` to equal the same RHS, but their quantifier triggers fire on disjoint terms. Asserting the transitive implication binds them through a shared common expression, letting z3 conclude `post1_packets@.map_values(...).to_set() == post2_packets@.map_values(...).to_set()`, which discharges the determinism postcondition.
